tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.exitWarning: Your progress will not be saved.

statusMessage.up: Nice work. You passed the tutorial.
statusMessage.stay: Almost there. A bit more practice and you'll get it.
statusMessage.down: Not validated yet. Retry the tutorial to reinforce the basics.

report.noteMinAssessment: Note: For a more accurate evaluation, tutorials assess at least 8 answers.

guidance.failed: We recommend retrying this tutorial before moving on to training.

welcome.title: Introduction to training
welcome.description: Dual N-Back challenges your working memory by requiring you to track two streams of information simultaneously: a visual position and a sound. This tutorial guides you step by step.

timeline.legend: The timeline helps comparison — it's hidden during the game

basics.title: The basics
basics.description: Learn the reflex and rhythm of classic Dual N-Back.

place.title: Dual Place
place.description: Master temporal placement on the timeline.

label.title: Dual Pick
label.description: Label each stimulus with its temporal reference (N, N-1, N-2).

trace.title: Dual Trace
trace.description: Learn active recall gestures through tracing.

memo.title: Dual Memo
memo.description: Rebuild the complete sequence from memory.

soroban.title: Soroban Mastery
soroban.description: Learn the Japanese abacus step by step through 8 progressive stages.

spotlight.intro: Welcome to Dual Place! Learn to place stimuli in temporal order.
spotlight.hud: Top: trial counter and N-back level.
spotlight.timeline: The timeline shows temporal order: N-2 (oldest) → N (present).
spotlight.cardPool: Cards represent stimuli. Place them on the timeline!

place.observe: Observe: a position on the grid and an audio letter.
place.buffer: Second stimulus. The N-back buffer is filling up.
place.cardsAppear: Cards appear! They represent the last 3 stimuli.
place.firstDrag: Click the marked card, then the N-2 slot (the oldest).
place.timelineExplain: The timeline shows time: N-2 = oldest, N = present.
place.positionN1: Place the middle position in the N-1 slot.
place.positionN: Great! Finish with the most recent position (N slot).
place.audioIntro: Now the audio cards! Same principle.
place.audioN2: Place the first letter heard in the N-2 slot.
place.audioN1: Continue with the middle letter (N-1 slot).
place.audioN: Finish with the most recent letter (N slot).
place.dualIntro: New trial! Place positions AND letters.
place.dualPractice: Place all 6 cards in the right slots. Take your time!
place.rhythmExplain: In real gameplay, you'll have limited time.
place.autonomy: Your turn! Place all cards correctly.
place.conclusion: Well done! You've mastered the basics of Dual Place.
place.selectCard: Select a card, then click its slot
place.clickSlot: Click the right slot to place the card
place.wrongSlot: Not that slot! Look at the temporal order.
place.wrongCard: Not that card. Find the one that matches the slot.
place.tryAgain: Try again! The correct slot is highlighted.

memo.clickToRecall: Click a slot to recall the value

spotlight.intro: Welcome to Dual Memo! Active recall training.
spotlight.grid: The grid displays stimuli. Memorize them well!
spotlight.recallZone: After each stimulus, recall the N-back window from memory.
spotlight.validateButton: When you've filled everything, click Validate.
spotlight.outro: Ready for the memory challenge? Let's go!

memo.observeFirst: First stimulus. Memorize both the position AND the letter!
memo.observeThird: Third stimulus. Buffer complete. Get ready!
memo.recallIntro: The grid disappears! Recall from memory. Click the N-2 slot.
memo.firstRecall: Click the N-2 slot. What was the first position?
memo.feedbackExplain: Green = correct. Red = error. You can correct up to 3 times!
memo.multiSlot: Continue! Recall positions N-1 and N.
memo.newStimulus: New stimulus! The N-back window shifts by one.
memo.windowShift: The window has shifted. Old N-2 exits, new N enters.
memo.audioIntro: New stimulus. Now we add audio recall!
memo.firstAudioRecall: Click the audio N-2 slot. Which letter?
memo.fullAudio: Continue with letters N-1 and N.
memo.dualIntro: In real gameplay, you recall positions AND letters together.
memo.dualPractice: Recall all 6 cells then click Validate.
memo.correctionExplain: If you make a mistake, click again to correct. Max 3 times.
memo.withCorrection: Try it! If you're wrong, correct by clicking again.
memo.conclusion: Excellent! You've mastered active recall. Start a session!
memo.wrongAnswer: That's not it. Think, which stimulus was at that moment?
memo.tryAgain: Try again! You can still correct.
memo.maxCorrections: 3 corrections reached. This slot is locked.
memo.validateHint: All slots are filled. Click Validate!

spotlight.intro: Welcome to Dual Pick! Learn to classify each stimulus.
spotlight.hud: Top: your progress in the tutorial.
spotlight.grid: The grid is divided into 3 zones: TOP, MIDDLE, BOTTOM.
spotlight.controls: These buttons classify. Position on the left, Sound on the right.
spotlight.outro: Ready? Let's start with position classification!

pick.intro: In Dual Pick, you classify each stimulus by two criteria: grid zone and sound type.
pick.gridExplain: The grid has 3 zones: TOP (top row), MIDDLE (center), BOTTOM (bottom row).
pick.positionHaut: The square is at the top. Click TOP.
pick.positionMilieu: The square is in the middle. Click MIDDLE.
pick.positionBas: The square is at the bottom. Click BOTTOM.
pick.positionRecap: Perfect! TOP = top row, MIDDLE = center, BOTTOM = bottom row.
pick.soundIntro: Now sounds. There are two types: VOWEL (A, E, I, O, U) and CONSONANT (all others).
pick.soundVoyelle: You hear A. It's a vowel. Click VOWEL.
pick.soundConsonne: You hear T. It's a consonant. Click CONSONANT.
pick.soundRecap: Remember: A, E, I, O, U = VOWEL. Everything else = CONSONANT.
pick.dualIntro: In real gameplay, you classify BOTH at the same time: position AND sound.
pick.dualFirst: Classify position AND sound. Take your time.
pick.rhythm: In session, keep a regular rhythm. Fluidity comes with practice.
pick.conclusion: Well done! You've mastered classification. Start a Dual Pick session!

feedback.wrongPosition: Not that zone. Look where the square is.
feedback.wrongSound: That's not it. A, E, I, O, U = vowels.

trace.intro: Welcome to Dual Trace. No buttons here: you'll actively recall the previous position through a swipe gesture.
trace.observe: Memorize this position. Next turn, you'll need to swipe towards it.
trace.firstSwipe: First swipe! Slide your finger towards the previous turn's position. The arrow guides you.
trace.firstAudioMatch: Same letter as the previous turn! Swipe to the position AND double-tap to signal the audio match.
trace.swipe1: Swipe towards the N-1 position. Remember where the square was.
trace.swipe2: Continue. Each swipe strengthens your active memory.
trace.swipe3: Active recall is more demanding than simple recognition.
trace.swipe4: Stay focused. Visualize the position before swiping.
trace.swipe5: Excellent! You've mastered the recall gesture.
trace.complete: Tutorial complete. You're ready for Dual Trace training.
trace.tapTargetAndAudio: Tap the target position, then Audio

feedback.wrongDirection: Not that direction. The previous position was here.
feedback.forgotAudio: Don't forget the double-tap for the audio match!

spotlight.intro: Dual Trace uses gestures instead of buttons. Let's discover the interface.
spotlight.hud: Your dashboard: N-Back level and progress.
spotlight.grid: The grid: a position appears each turn. You'll need to swipe towards the previous position (N-1).
spotlight.outro: Let's practice. First observe, then swipe when it's your turn.

workingMemory.title: Working memory
workingMemory.desc: Dual N-Back trains your working memory. You must remember stimuli N steps ago and detect matches.

positionMode.title: Position mode
positionMode.desc: Watch the square position. When it appears in the same spot as 2 steps ago, press Position.

yourTurn.title: Your turn
yourTurn.desc: Press Position when the square is in the same position as 2 steps ago.

audioMode.title: Audio mode
audioMode.desc: Listen to the letters. When you hear the same letter as 2 steps ago, press Audio.

audioPractice.title: Audio practice
audioPractice.desc: Press Audio when you hear the same letter as 2 steps ago.

dualMode.title: Dual mode
dualMode.desc: Combine position AND audio. Press the corresponding button when a repetition occurs.

spotlight.hud: Your dashboard: N-back level, turn counter, and session controls.
spotlight.timeline: The timeline keeps the last 3 stimuli to help comparison. In real gameplay, this help is hidden.
spotlight.grid: The grid: each turn, a cell lights up in one of 8 positions. At the same time, a letter is spoken.
spotlight.controls: Your response buttons. Press when you detect a repetition.
spotlight.intro: Welcome! Let's discover the game interface together.
spotlight.outro: Now let's move to a guided session. Watch the animations and follow the instructions.

assessment.title: Assessed phase
assessment.subtitle: From now on, it's a short classic run.
assessment.body: The pace is continuous and you won't get any more hints. Play like in a real session.
assessment.goal: Goal: at least {{min}}% accuracy over {{count}} trials.

levels.title: Understanding N levels
levels.desc: You learned N=2. Here's how it generalizes from N=1 to N=4.

annotation.n1: N=1: compare the current stimulus (N) with the previous turn (N-1).
annotation.n2: N=2: compare the current stimulus (N) with two turns back (N-2).
annotation.n3: N=3: compare the current stimulus (N) with three turns back (N-3).

levels.outroBody: If you move to N=5, you'll compare with N-5. The rule stays the same; only the distance increases.

annotations.intro: Observe: a cell lights up on the grid and a letter is spoken at the same time.
annotations.observe: Memorize. The timeline keeps track of stimuli.
annotations.firstComparison: You now have enough history to compare.
annotations.firstPositionMatch: Same position as 2 turns ago! Compare N and N-2 on the timeline, then press Position.
annotations.firstAudioMatch: Same letter as 2 turns ago! Compare N and N-2 on the timeline, then press Audio.
annotations.firstDualMatch: Double match! Both position AND sound repeat. Press both buttons.
annotations.dualMatch: Both match. Press Position and Audio.
annotations.noMatch: No match this turn. Keep memorizing.
annotations.noMatch1: No repetition this time. Tap to continue.
annotations.noMatch2: Still no match. Stay focused on the position + sound flow.
annotations.noMatch3: Nothing to report. Always compare with N-2 on the timeline.
annotations.noMatch4: No match. The pace is picking up now.
annotations.noMatch6: No match. Keep going, you've got the rhythm.
annotations.noMatch8: Almost done. A few more stimuli.
annotations.complete: Congratulations! You've mastered the basics of Dual N-Back. Ready for training?

exit.title: Quit the tutorial?
exit.message: Your progress will be saved. You can resume later.

recovery.staleMessage: An interrupted session from more than 30 minutes ago was found.
recovery.title: Resume the tutorial?
